title: Updating Forecast Functions for a Simple Exponential Smoothing Model
description: A flowchart demonstrating the process of updating the level component (L_t) and generating a new forecast (Y_{t+h|t}) when a new actual observation (Y_{t+1}) becomes available.
relationships: L_t and Y_{t+1} are combined using α to calculate L_{t+1}
L_{t+1} is then used as the new constant forecast for all future horizons
